THEPENITENT-THE_PENITENT.aromaPrinciple: Faith is not absolution. It is the strength to carry what must be paid.
THEPENITENT-THE_PENITENT.banter.alive.en: Your hesitation becomes a burden. Act.
THEPENITENT-THE_PENITENT.banter.dead.end: Even from silence, I wait for your choice.
THEPENITENT-THE_PENITENT.cardsModifierDe: Penitent cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
THEPENITENT-THE_PENITENT.description: A priest of debt and devotion. The Penitent prevents harm with Faith, survives through borrowed healing, and turns Burden into punishment.
THEPENITENT-THE_PENITENT.eventDeathPreve: Not yet. My debt remains unpaid.
THEPENITENT-THE_PENITENT.goldMonologue: Gold is a poor substitute for absolution, but it will serve.
THEPENITENT-THE_PENITENT.title: The Penitent
